auth.tagline3: The alarm app that guarantees you wake up

alarm.title: Set your wake-up time
alarm.notificationBody: Do 10 squats to wake yourself up
alarm.permissionMessage: Please allow notifications to set alarms

sns.title: Connect with X
sns.subtitle: to prevent oversleeping
sns.description:
If you oversleep, a post will be automatically made on X
All your followers will know you overslept
sns.disconnectConfirmMessage: If you disconnect, automatic posting when you oversleep will be disabled

squat.title: Squat Test
squat.description:
We are measuring your squat form
Hold your phone in your right hand and cross your arms in front of your chest while squatting

pay.tagline3: The alarm app that guarantees you wake up

wakeup.successMessage: Good morning! You woke up successfully! Have a great day!

notification.alarmBody: It's time to wake up. Please do 10 squats within 5 minutes
notification.oversleepPosted: Oversleep post has been posted to X

penalty.postText:
I overslept...
I am a foolish person who cannot wake up on time and easily oversleeps.
#WakeOrShame

weekly.summary: Last week you woke up successfully {{successCount}} times and did {{squatCount}} squats

settings.title: Settings
settings.deleteAccountConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.

calibration.title: Squat Calibration
calibration.subtitle: Learning your squat pattern
calibration.instruction:
Hold your phone in your right hand
and cross your arms in front of your chest
calibration.phaseNormalDesc: Do 5 normal squats at your usual pace

setup.title: Initial Setup

This will help you wake up
setup.step3Description:
You're all set
Start your early morning life from tomorrow!
